overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following a giant holographic koi fish swimming through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city at night. The scene blends traditional Japanese temple architecture with neon-lit modern skyscrapers, showcasing the fish's glowing bioluminescent fins as it drifts from a covered walkway into an open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with traditional Japanese architecture

events.description: camera begins tracking left to follow the holographic koi as it swims along the building facade
moving from deep shadow under the awning into area with more direct neon illumination

agents.ego_description: smoothly tracking the holographic koi fish as it swims along the traditional building facade, maintaining consistent distance

notable_agents.action: giant holographic koi fish swimming slowly through the air with flowing orange-gold fins and bioluminescent scales

entered.detail: two-story wooden structure with curved black tile roof, red wooden beams, and paper screen windows
large illuminated traditional Japanese lantern with black calligraphy characters glowing white
cluster of cylindrical dark metal barrels grouped near the building entrance
tall green bamboo plants growing in planter boxes alongside the building wall

segments.scene_description: The camera tracks a glowing holographic koi fish swimming along a traditional Japanese building with red wooden architecture and a curved black roof. The wet green tiles reflect neon lights from hanging paper lanterns while the fish's translucent fins trail golden light particles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk plaza with modern high-rise buildings

events.description: exiting the covered traditional walkway into the open neon-lit cyberpunk plaza with modern skyscrapers
camera circles around the holographic fish to showcase its full form against the backdrop of neon city buildings

agents.ego_description: circling around the holographic koi as it navigates through the open plaza, revealing the expansive cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: holographic koi swimming gracefully toward the plaza center, tail fins spreading wide with golden light trails

entered.detail: tall multi-story towers with illuminated windows, neon advertisements, and industrial metal facades
large glowing billboard displaying a pink heart symbol and purple neon lighting
wide steps leading down to a lower level of the pedestrian plaza
transparent safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide cyberpunk plaza as the holographic koi swims away from the traditional architecture toward modern neon-lit skyscrapers. The camera circles the glowing fish, capturing its translucent form against a backdrop of towering buildings with purple and red neon billboards, while the wet pavement reflects the vibrant city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate confines of traditional Japanese architecture into the vast scale of a neon-drenched cyberpunk plaza. It begins by tracking a glowing holographic koi fish as it glides alongside red wooden buildings and curved black roofs, where wet green tiles reflect the soft glow of hanging paper lanterns. As the fish swims forward, the scene opens and expands, leaving the traditional structures behind to enter a wide urban square. The camera then circles the translucent creature, shifting the backdrop to towering skyscrapers adorned with vibrant purple and red neon billboards. Finally, the movement captures the fish drifting across the open space, its golden light particles contrasting with the rain-slicked pavement reflecting the city's electric glare.
